params.expected_text: 이 서비스는 회사 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다

notes: Phase3-B14: VTS-level hold state machine fix. _apf_hold_active flag prevents re-buffering after release. Previous B13 hotfix broke clean POST connections due to session-level hold affecting all H2 streams. B14 adds per-VTS hold state tracking. Build deployed 14:47 KST.
